images.description: Headshot: Official professional headshot of Julian Vane, Professional First Hand.
images.prompt: Professional high-end headshot of a 35-year-old British-Nigerian man with a short buzz cut, clean-shaven face, focused gaze, wearing a crisp white collared shirt

images.description: Workshop Selfie: A candid capture of Julian Vane in the tailoring workshop during a build period.
images.prompt: Casual smartphone mirror selfie taken by Julian Vane in a tailoring workshop, wearing a work apron over a t-shirt, messy background

projects.title: Bespoke Morning Coat
projects.description: Technical construction and tailoring for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', utilizing Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing.

photos.description: Construction Detail: Hand-executed pad stitching for 'Bespoke Morning Coat'. This internal stitching is critical for ensuring the proper lapel roll in the Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing style.
Pressing: The final press of the Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing jacket for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', demonstrating the crisp, professional tailoring standards required.

Internal Architecture: A view of the hidden interfacing layers for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', which form the structural foundation of the Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing silhouette.
Cutting Layout: Precision-cut fabric components for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', laid out and prepared for the complex Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing assembly process.
Pattern Draft: The master pattern set for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', engineered specifically to achieve the Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing design requirements.
Stitch Quality: A close-up of the heavy-duty top-stitching on Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing materials for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', highlighting tension and consistency.
Completed Garment: The finished build for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', a complex Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing piece presented on a professional dress form.
Hardware Details: Custom closures and fastenings sourced for 'Bespoke Morning Coat', completing the Heavy wool, horsehair canvas, hand stitching, crisp pressing aesthetic.
